action: Model project-state transitions so supersession, coexistence, and contradiction are not conflated.
selected_from: M-001 handoff: add commit and decision-history records, then model contradictions as linked records rather than overwriting earlier observations.
verification: Three provenance-linked transitions distinguish temporal supersession from evidence-layer coexistence and reserve contradiction for mutually exclusive claims with matching subject, scope, and interval.
privacy_boundary: Public repository files and commit metadata only; no private chat, health, credentials, identifying personal data, or unreviewed uploads.
handoff: Next continuity item should connect decision-language changes to artifact and commit history using the same temporal relation model, then add an explicit contradiction record only when matched scope and interval make coexistence impossible.
